Curriculum · CentralHub

Schedule Settings

Set the weekly lesson hours for each subject across all programmes. These values determine topic date distribution in the syllabus pages.

Access Restricted

This page is only available to Central Admins.

Weekly hours control how topics are distributed across teaching weeks. Term dates and total teaching weeks are managed in Academic Calendar → Year Settings.
Save All — apply changes to all programmes at once
